mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (telegram_user_id, username, first_name, last_name, language_code, photo_url) VALUES (#{telegramUserId}, #{username}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{languageCode}, #{photoUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET telegram_user_id = #{telegramUserId}, username = #{username}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, language_code = #{languageCode}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET language_code = #{languageCode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE app_user SET username = #{username}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, language_code = #{languageCode}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE telegram_user_id = #{telegramUserId}
